item.arguments: Use $simplify after a recent change added wrappers and helper indirection around one request flow.
success_definition: Keeps the scope on recent or changed work.
Names concrete removable or collapsible complexity.

item.arguments: Use $simplify on a diff that introduced a configurable helper with one concrete use and no second caller yet.
success_definition: Prefers collapsing or localizing when appropriate.
Avoids turning the answer into a broad architecture rewrite.

item.arguments: Use $simplify to review a feature branch before final review and remove any accidental complexity without drifting into unrelated files.
success_definition: Keeps the recommendation bounded to the changed area.
